power_strike.name: Power Strike
power_strike.description: A powerful melee strike dealing 1.5x attack damage.

fire_bolt.name: Fire Bolt
fire_bolt.description: Hurl a bolt of fire. 25% chance to burn.

ice_shard.name: Ice Shard
ice_shard.description: Launch a shard of ice. 20% chance to freeze.

thunder.name: Thunder
thunder.description: Call down lightning. 15% chance to stun.

quick_slash.name: Quick Slash
quick_slash.description: A fast slash with increased critical hit chance.

backstab.name: Backstab
backstab.description: Strike from the shadows. Very high crit chance.

shield_bash.name: Shield Bash
shield_bash.description: Bash with your shield. 35% chance to stun.

poison_bite.name: Poison Bite
poison_bite.description: A venomous bite. 40% chance to poison.

heal.name: Heal
heal.description: Restore HP to one ally based on magic stat.

defend.name: Defend
defend.description: Double defense until your next turn.
